race.comment: Another open race. SAVAII (1) had an excuse when well supported over 1200m here first-up. Brought a hat-trick from his initial preparation and won a CL1 at Canberra easily, his only second-up outing. Has a handy 2kg claim today, and the tongue tie is applied for the first time. Tough to beat. Collett is off the above to ride WILD SENSATION (9), who resumed at Beaumont (Newcastle) with a solid effort. Suited over the longer sprint and maps for the run of the race. CHEBICI (12) peaks and went well enough here last time to consider. ACHESON (5) has a handy 2kg claim and on his latest effort won't be far away.
